scripts.build: npm --prefix learnEnglish-master/learnEnglish-master run build && node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; import path from 'node:path'; fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync(path.join('learnEnglish-master', 'learnEnglish-master', 'dist'), 'dist', { recursive: true });"
